name: Cream Cheese Swirls
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup vegetable oil or melted margarine
recipeInstructions:
Cream-Cheese Filling
1 package cream cheese -- (8 oz.)
6 tablespoons sugar
1 egg -- slightly beaten
1/2 teaspoon lemon extract
Sweet Glaze
2 cups powdered sugar -- sifted
1/2 teaspoon vanilla or lemon extract
4 tablespoons milk
1. In a large bowl, dissolve yeast in water. Blend in eggs and oil or margarine. Add 5 cups Hot Roll Mix. Stir well. Add enough Hot Roll Mix to make a soft, not too sticky dough. Knead about 5 minutes until the dough is smooth.
2. Lightly butter a bowl. Put the dough in the bowl and turn to coat the top. Cover with a damp towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk, about 1 hour.
3. Generously grease two baking sheets.
4. Prepare Cream-Cheese Filling. Punch down the dough. Let stand for 10 minutes.
5. On a floured surface, roll the dough to 12 inches x 24 inches, about 1/4 inch thick. Brush with melted butter or margarine. Sprinkle brown sugar and cinnamon over the butter. Roll the dough like a jelly roll. Cut into 1-inch slices.
6. Place the slices on prepared baking sheets. Cover with a damp towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk, 30 to 60 minutes.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F.
8. With a tablespoon, press a deep indentation in the center of each bun. Fill each indentation with 3 tablespoons Cream-Cheese Filling.
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, until golden brown.
10. Prepare Sweet Glaze by combining all ingredients.
11. Drizzle glaze over warm buns.
